projects.description: This application was developed for a local business specialising in the sale and maintenance of machinery used in the manufacturing of circuit boards. The business operates at significant scale, managing thousands of individual feeders at any given time — each uniquely identified by a serial code. </br></br> Previously, this inventory was tracked manually via spreadsheet, a process prone to high error rates and inefficiencies given the volume of assets involved. This application was built to replace that workflow, providing a reliable and structured system for logging, tracking, and managing feeder inventory with accuracy and ease.
projects.skills: Typescript, Adinos JS, Electron, React, MySql
